requested_items.notes: Current stable integrated checkpoint. The sigmoid-enabled nm1 block passes build_generator, generate_block_rtl, and 1_1_yosys_canonicalize, but this does not yet provide physical metrics.
The next synth stage (1_2_yosys) still times out on the full-top target, so the current integrated proof target remains too large.
The direct yosys_stats_prefilter side path failed immediately due to an implementation bug and has been backed out; it is not accepted evidence.

next_required_item.notes: Use reduced integrated proxy `runs/designs/npu_blocks/npu_fp16_cpp_nm1_sigmoidproxy` with `config_nm1_sigmoidproxy.json` and `sweep_proxy_firstpass.json`, gated by the accepted canonicalize checkpoint from `r14`.
